Yesterday it was working and we didnt make any changes.

And if it possible may I face any problems?

entry.title: Re: Old and new exceptions cannot be used at the same time
entry.content:
In exception tab I got the below message
"Class constructors and destructors do not have parameters and exceptions"

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: While implementing an event handler, I noticed that requests to existing entities such as Products and Suppliers, stopped working with a message "Service "northbreeze" has no handler for "READ northbreeze.Products"." This occurs as soon as I add the srv/main.js file.

entry.title: BUT000-ZXXXX Custom field not updating in MDG Consolidation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am have added few fields in BUT000 Table.

Created the Resultant artifacts with the structures and Apply selected. I can see BUT000_PRC and BUT000_SRC

When I try uploading the data using file consolidation, Table BUT000 is not getting updated with this field.

I there any other step I have to preform ?. 

Could you pleas help.

entry.title: Re: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usa...
entry.content:
Yes, I have added (many) Measurement Documents for the Measurement Point linked to the Maintenance Plan using IK11.

When using a Maintenance Plan with a Measurement Point (Counter) assigned, you cannot enter a Start of Cycle. The "driver" for the Maintenance Plan is the Measurement Point (Counter).

entry.title: How to set job for change price determination?
entry.content:
We would like to set Job for APP change price determination.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set job for change price determination?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


In order to set a job to Change Price Determination (CKMM), you can go to app "Schedule Inventory Accounting Jobs" and select template Change Material Price Determination, you can use F1 help for guidance. In step 3 you can select the parameters. 

Schedule Inventory Accounting Jobs

Change Price Determination


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Duplicate ID error while working with Adaptation project
entry.content: I have extended a standard Fiori application using Adaptation project. I extended the view and added a new section(fragment) and deployed to FLP.   How to avoid/clear duplicate ID error while navigating back from FLP and getting back into the app?

entry.title: BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello friends, I want to change the LOEKZ field in EKPO as seen in the codes below. However, although BAPI returns a success message, LOEKZ does not change. Why could it be ? I add my code below .

 

       LOOP AT lt_wf_td_003 INTO ls_wf_td_003.
          APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_poitem ASSIGNING <fs_poitem>.
          <fs_poitem>-po_item    = ls_wf_td_003-ebelp.
          <fs_poitem>-delete_ind = abap_false.

          APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_poitemx ASSIGNING <fs_poitemx>.
          <fs_poitemx>-po_item    = ls_wf_td_003-ebelp.
          <fs_poitemx>-po_itemx   = abap_true .
          <fs_poitemx>-delete_ind = abap_true.

          UNASSIGN: <fs_poitem>,<fs_poitemx>.
        ENDLOOP.

        " Call BAPI To Update PO With Items Table
        CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_PO_CHANGE'
          EXPORTING
            purchaseorder = iv_doc_number+0(10)
          TABLES
            return        = lt_return_po
            poitem        = lt_poitem
            poitemx       = lt_poitemx.

        LOOP AT lt_return_po TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS WHERE type CA 'EAX'.
          EXIT.
        ENDLOOP.
        IF sy-subrc NE 0. " No Error
          CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
            EXPORTING
              wait = 'X'.
       ENDIF.

entry.title: Archiving FI_DOCUMNT and getting 'CO Data not yet Archived' but the CO documents are archived
entry.content: I am trying to archive some documents thru FI_DOCUMNT and getting the following error 'CO Data not yet Archived'.  Going to FB03 and looking at the relationship browser I show 2 CO documents and confirmed both are archived.  The document is a split posting and the main document shows as archived but not the 4 split documents.  Any ideas?

entry.title: How to Master Planning strategies in SAP PP Demand Management?
entry.content:
I am a SAP SD consultant with over 7 years of experience, basically interested in SAP Logistics Modules such SAP MM, SAP PP, SAP LE and SAP WM.

I have fair amount of Knowledge on the above Modules.

I want to get Command over SAP PP Demand Management Planning Strategies.

So SAP PP guys please advise.

entry.title: Re: Third-Party Cookies and SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Hi @p_m - We are aware of this development. For the moment, I believe it means that SAC will continue to work as-is without further action required by customers. However, we will need to get clarity on Google's plan to "introduce a new experience in Chrome that lets people make an informed choice that applies across their web browsing" (per A new path for Privacy Sandbox on the web). I plan to update this blog once more details are available.

entry.title: BAPI_SALES_ORDER_CHANGE issues removing delivery block
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

I've been encountering issues when trying to use BAPI_SALES_ORDER_CHANGE to remove delivery block. Here's the issues I'm getting:

-When trying to change 2 sales orders, 1st one gets posted successfully while second throws an error saying "Sales document is still being process by (same user)

- When trying to change 4 sales orders, I get a random change of vbuk-uvals to value 'B' which means partially processed then on the latter part of the program, delivery fails...

Can you please help if there's any missing parameters that I need to add? or if I'm missing anything. I attached my code below: 

 

loop at lt_salesorder_change assigning <lfs_salesorder_change>.

            lwa_orderheader_in-dlv_block = ''.
            lwa_orderheader_inx-updateflag = c_update_flag.
            lwa_orderheader_inx-dlv_block = c_flag.

            call function 'BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE'
              exporting
                salesdocument    = <lfs_salesorder_change>-vbeln
                order_header_in  = lwa_orderheader_in
                order_header_inx = lwa_orderheader_inx
              tables
                return           = lt_chg_return.

            read table lt_chg_return into lwa_chg_return with key type = c_error.
            if sy-subrc EQ 0.
              call function 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'.
            else.
              call function 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
                exporting
                  wait   = abap_on
                importing
                  return = lwa_commit_return.
            endif.  

      endloop.

 

 Thanks,

Geoff

entry.title: Creating an L3-L8 Approval Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi,

We would like to add more management levels to our workflow approvals. However, with SuccessFactors not having an organizational hierarchy automatically saved, it's been difficult finding a way to expand our workflow approval list. I have looked into the option if using the Custom Manager in the Approver Type list, but I was only able to add one level. We currently created a dynamic role for our L2 leaders and this list is easy to maintain because it's a 1:1 relationship with employee assigned Function. Unfortunately, our L3-L8 doesn't have a 1:1 relationship with any employee attributes. 

Are there any other customers that have successfully built a workflow approval list of this type and if yes, does it require a lot of maintenance and how did you configure it?

Thanks in advance!
Annie

entry.title: Hi, Can restrict portlet edit access using business rule
entry.content:
There are two custom MDF portlets - GMC & Dependent

I want to restrict dependent portlet

The dependent portlet itself needs to create a start date and end date, once these dates are initiated by ABC group, that particular period only employees have access to Dependent portlet edit access.

Note : ABC group people only have initiating start date and end date access, filed should not visible to others.

Under GMC portlet, there is field GMC coverage - if yes then Emp have access only can add 3 Dependent if not only 2 dependent access. like Add dependent child associates need to be restrict.

entry.title: SAP's Collaboration with Microsoft and Wipro to Provide Near-Zero Cost RISE Migration Offering
entry.content:
As more and more customers embark on digital transformation journeys, SAP and its best-in-class ecosystem continue to support organizations in achieving a future state IT operating model, driving innovation, and creating competitive advantage.

The newest collaboration between SAP, Wipro, and Microsoft has been designed to help customers adapt their IT Operating Model, transitioning from their SAP on-premise deployments to a cloud delivered enterprise IT estate, via RISE with SAP. The combined expertise of SAP, Wipro, and Microsoft will provide customers a simpler and more economically viable option to help them reimagine their business models, streamline operations, and deliver superior customer experiences.

"We are excited to be able to bring our customers the benefits of this three-way collaboration between Wipro, SAP and Microsoft", said Srinivas Sai N., VP and SAP Global Practice Head at Wipro. "By leveraging our industry expertise and digital capabilities, coupled with the know-how of SAP and Microsoft, together we will be able to accelerate our customers’ journeys as intelligent enterprises and help them achieve sustainable growth."

Together, the three partners aim to provide customers with clarity and a prescriptive and harmonized set of recommendations, leveraging each party’s best practices, to harness the full potential of RISE with SAP to fuel innovation, drive growth, and thrive in the digital economy.

Microsoft will provide the robust cloud infrastructure necessary to support the scalability, security, and performance requirements of RISE with SAP deployments whilst Wipro will leverage its extensive expertise in digital transformation and industry-specific solutions to drive the adoption of RISE with SAP, whilst all three will all offer financial incentives to help customers migrate to RISE in a cost-effective manner.

"We are proud to work with SAP and Wipro to support accelerated RISE with SAP deployments," said Silvio Bessa, Global SAP Practice Leader at Microsoft. "Microsoft Cloud is a scalable secure solution to provide the performance needed for successful digital transformations and tangible differentiation value to customers."

RISE with SAP is a comprehensive offering which helps to manage the change and risk associated with an organization’s transition from SAP S/4HANA to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, combining the power of SAP's industry-leading software with business process redesign services, infrastructure, and best-in-class partners to deliver tangible business outcomes. 

David Robinson, President Cloud ERP – RISE with SAP adds, “We are pleased to bring the partner ecosystem into the RISE transformation to simplify our customer’s journey to the cloud to modernize their legacy ERP. We encourage our customers who are in a position to benefit from this partnership to connect with their account teams, and we look forward to accelerating many more transformation journeys in the months ahead.”

For more information about RISE with SAP and the partnership with Wipro and Microsoft's Cloud Solutions, please visit the following:

  • RISE with SAP
  • Wipro Practice Page
  • SAP on the Microsoft Cloud – SAP Cloud Platform | Microsoft Azure

entry.title: Re: Story Reporting: Unable to find fields in available data
entry.content: Hi, wondering if anyone has been able to locate the Level in Org field in Story reporting? I can find Direct Reports but am currently hunting for Level in Org.

entry.title: Re: 1EG - Bank Integration with File Interface
entry.content: I'm not sure if a middleware, because reading the documentation in the best practices page there isn't an API to get the information in 1EG. Maybe using a RPA you can download the file, but I'm not sure if that is the best approach when the scenario 2YM has API. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/2ym-bank-connectivity-via-api/qaq-p/12349823

entry.title: Re: MDK 401 response
entry.content: The error message indicates a problem for the use to retrieve the metadata for the backend service.  Could the user be locked out of the backend for some reason or is the new metadata using a different / new service that the user might not have access to?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to do validation in unmanaged RAP with...
entry.content:
https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/abenbdl_validations.htm

Availability

  • Managed RAP BOs
  • Unmanaged and draft-enabled RAP BOs.

    Caution: Not available for unmanaged, non-draft RAP BOs.

Sounds like it could a merging of Build and SBPA Forms, but only 2 sentences to go by...

entry.title: Re: Difference Between Asset Acquisition in F0859 and MIR...
entry.content: Thank you Mark for answering, since purchasing scope is not included, does this mean there is no difference between standard and advanced apps?

entry.title: Re: How to Master Planning strategies in SAP PP Demand Management?
entry.content:
Hi azeem,

There are plenty of blogs and community posts you can find regarding this topic, you can start by learning the most common for MTS(10,40) and MTO (20,50).

Here are few posts that I could easily find for you.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/overview-of-sap-planning-strategy/ba-p/13243148

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/planning-strategy-10-vs-planning-strategy-30-in-mts/ba-p/13281510

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/make-to-order-strategies-strategy-20/ba-p/13253776

Regards.

Alejandro Peña

entry.title: Re: SUB BOM AND MRP CALCULATION
entry.content:
Hi,

MRP does not use Production Time in BOM for calculations, then you have to set lead time for B (2 days) & C (3 days) in Item Master Data >>> Planning Tab, then run MRP again.

Hope this helps,

Son Tran

entry.title: Re: confirmed quantity still exists after goods issue
entry.content:
Hi TimoGn,

Goods Issue qty from MIGO (261) is different from confirmed qty, confirmed qty will be updated on your operation details only after doing a production confirmation, either by CO11N or CO15.

Please check if you have already confirmed your order by checking order status or CO14.

Regards.

entry.title: BYD: How to create warehouse task (or warehouse request) by Webservice?
entry.content:
If there is a web service that generates warehouse tasks based on an incoming delivery notification. Currently, generate warehouse tasks could use automatic actions by "create warehouse request" from UI side.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD: How to create warehouse task (or warehouse reque...
entry.content: Warehouse Request can only be created from UI end, cannot be created though webservice. Currently, you can only create Inbound Delivery Notification via API service, neither to create warehouse request nor warehouse task.

entry.title: How to maintain multiple payment advice email recipients by implementing custom logic？
entry.content:
Business Background

When a payment is made to suppliers using the Manage Automatic Payments app, payment advice can be sent to suppliers via email. The email address of the recipients are usually maintained in the output determination parameters, or derived from the communication information in the supplier master data.

Is there any case where instead of sending the payment advice to regular recipients, you want the payment advice to be sent to more than one email recipient, and copy to one or more recipients? If so, congrats! In this blog post, I will show a step by step procedure about this. Read on to find how to maintain multiple email recipients for payment advice by implementing custom logic.

Overview

To maintain multiple email recipients for payment advice, I basically need to do the following steps:

  1. Maintain email address in business partner master data. When payment advice forms are created, the Output Parameter Determination app retrieves the email address entered in the master data of the business partner. 
  2. Use the Addition of Email Recipients Business Add-In (BAdI) to implement custom logic that enables sending of payment advice outputs to multiple email addresses, including TO, CC and BCC recipients.
  3. Maintain the email address defined in custom logic in the payment advice determination step for email recipient in the Output Parameter Determination app. The custom logic is called during output parameter determination to determine the required email recipients.
  4. After a payment run, check if the output items have been sent to the specified recipients.

Procedure

Maintain Email Address in Business Partner Master Data

In the Manage Business Partner Master Data app, I maintain info@partner.com, bp_gen_email_1@sap.com, bp_gen_email_2@sap.com as email address in the address details of the supplier. info@partner.com is standard communication email while   bp_gen_email_1@sap.com and bp_gen_email_2@sap.com are additional email addresses.

 

 

 

 

 

Implement the BAdI and Create Custom Logic

1. In the Custom Logic app, choose Create to create a new implementation.

2. Search for the BAdI Addition of Email Recipients (ID: APOC_ADD_EMAIL_RECIPIENTS) and select it as the extension point.

3. Add FFO_PAYM_ADV as filter value.4.  Enter a description and ID for the implementation.

5. Review the details of the implementation. If no change is required, create and publish it。

6. Open code editor to create custom logic. You can utilize the sample code provided as a basis or reference to create your own custom code.

*The following is sample code for enabling multiple TO email recipients. The email recipients are supposed to be retrieved from the ones that I have maintained in communication information in the Manage Business Partner Master Data app.

 

DATA: ls_additional_email_recipient LIKE LINE OF additionalemailrecipients.

SELECT addressid
   FROM i_buspartaddress  WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS
   WHERE businesspartner = @recipient
   INTO TABLE (lt_address_id).

IF lt_address_id IS NOT INITIAL.
  " Get Email Address
  SELECT emailaddress
  FROM i_addressemailaddress_2  WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS
   FOR ALL ENTRIES IN _address_id
  WHERE addressid  = _address_id-addressid
  INTO TABLE (lt_emailaddress) .

  LOOP AT lt_emailaddress ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_emailaddress>).
    ls_additional_email_recipient-outputrequestitememailrole = 'TO'.
    ls_additional_email_recipient-outputrequestitememailaddress = <fs_emailaddress>-emailaddress.
    APPEND ls_additional_email_recipient TO additionalemailrecipients.
  ENDLOOP.

ENDIF.

 

 

Maintain Email Recipients in BRF+ Settings

After defining custom logic for email recipients by using the BAdI implementation, I need to maintain the email address with email type code (TO, CC and BCC) in the business rules for payment advice email recipient.

1. In the Output Parameter Determination app, select Payment Advice from the Show Rules for dropdown list and Email Recipient for the Determination Step dropdown list.

2. Insert a new row in the decision table. Choose PAYM_ADV (Payment Advice) as output type, and select an email type code (for example, TO (To) for direct recipients).

3. In the Email Address field, choose Select Expressions from the dropdown list. In the dialog box that opens, apply the following search criteria and trigger the search:

  • Application Name=OPD_APOC_SYSTEM
  • Expression Type=Constant

4. In the search result, select the Add email recipients from custom logic constant and confirm.

5. Activate your changes.

During output parameter determination, the system will call the Addition of Email Recipients BAdI for each row that you have entered to determine additional email recipients.

Create Payment Run and Check Output Result

In the Manage Automatic Payments app, I create a payment run to pay the supplier. By calling the custom logic that I created for multiple TO email recipients, the payment advice for this payment run was sent to the three email recipients that I maintained in business partner master data.

Another Case

I want to payment advices to be sent to a regular recipient, and CC an additional recipient.

In the Manage Supplier Master Data app, I maintain bp_email_test@sap.com as Clerk's internet address at company code level (the regular recipient). 

And I hardcode the email address of the additional recipient in the custom logic.

*The following is sample code for enabling a TO email recipient and a CC email recipient. The TO email recipient is supposed to be retrieved from the information maintained in the clerk's internet address field (Clrk's internet add.) in the supplier master data at company code level, while the CC email recipient is hardcoded in the custom logic.

 

DATA: ls_additional_email_recipient LIKE LINE OF additionalemailrecipients.
DATA: ls_supplier TYPE i_suppliercompany.
DATA: ls_customer TYPE i_customercompany.

IF recipientrole = 'H'.    " Supplier
  SELECT SINGLE * INTO _supplier
                  FROM i_suppliercompany
                 WHERE supplier = @recipient AND
                       companycode = @outputcontrolapplicationobject+15(4).

  IF ls_supplier-accountingclerkinternetaddress IS NOT INITIAL.
    " Fill To email address from BP master data
    CLEAR ls_additional_email_recipient.
    ls_additional_email_recipient-outputrequestitememailrole = 'TO'.
    ls_additional_email_recipient-outputrequestitememailaddress = ls_supplier-accountingclerkinternetaddress.
    APPEND ls_additional_email_recipient TO additionalemailrecipients.

    " Fill the hardcode CC email address
    CLEAR ls_additional_email_recipient.
    ls_additional_email_recipient-outputrequestitememailrole = 'CC'.
    ls_additional_email_recipient-outputrequestitememailaddress = 'hardcode_supplier_cc@sap.com'.
    APPEND ls_additional_email_recipient TO additionalemailrecipients.
  ENDIF.
ELSEIF recipientrole = 'S'.    " Customer
  SELECT SINGLE * INTO _customer
                       FROM i_customercompany
                      WHERE customer = @recipient AND
                            companycode = @outputcontrolapplicationobject+15(4).

  IF ls_customer-accountingclerkinternetaddress IS NOT INITIAL.
    " Fill To email address from BP master data
    CLEAR ls_additional_email_recipient.
    ls_additional_email_recipient-outputrequestitememailrole = 'TO'.
    ls_additional_email_recipient-outputrequestitememailaddress = ls_customer-accountingclerkinternetaddress.
    APPEND ls_additional_email_recipient TO additionalemailrecipients.

    " Fill the hardcode CC email address
    CLEAR ls_additional_email_recipient.
    ls_additional_email_recipient-outputrequestitememailrole = 'CC'.
    ls_additional_email_recipient-outputrequestitememailaddress = 'hardcode_customer_cc@sap.com'.
    APPEND ls_additional_email_recipient TO additionalemailrecipients.
  ENDIF.
ENDIF.

 

I maintain the corresponding business rules in the Output Parameter Determination app as described in the first scenario.

I create another payment run. By calling the custom logic that I created for TO and CC email recipients, the payment advice was sent to the desired recipients.

Conclusion

In this blog post, I described a step-by-step procedure about how to implement custom logic to enable sending of payment advices to multiple recipients, together with sample custom logics. I hope you find this useful when you have the same business cases. If you have any question about this topic, you're welcome to leave a comment!

For more information about payment advices, please check the following help documentation at SAP Help Portal:

For a brief understanding of outgoing payment advices, see Outgoing Payment Advices | SAP Help Portal

For common questions about payment advices, see Outgoing Payment Advices: FAQ | SAP Help Portal

For step-by-step configuration procedures for payment advice outputs, see Configuring the Output of Payment Advice Forms: Email Channel | SAP Help Portal and Configuring the Output of Payment Advice Forms: Printout | SAP Help Portal

For supported extensibility options for payment advices, see Customizing Payment Advice Email Templates | SAP Help Portal and Adding Custom Fields to Payment Advice Forms | SAP Help Portal

For standard documentation about this topic, see Adding Additional Email Recipients for Payment Advices | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Empty Adobe form when called from an application program
entry.content:
Hi folks,

Good afternoon. I created an Adobe form and the Interface in the SFP TCode. When I executed the Adobe form from the SFP Tcode the form was filled correctly but if I call the form from an application Z Program the form is empty (Only the structure but not the data).

The Z program has this structure.

  1. CALL FUNCTION 'FP_JOB_OPEN' (To open the output).
  2. CALL FUNCTION 'FP_FUNCTION_MODULE_NAME' (To get the function module name associated with the form).
  3. CALL FUNCTION [The FM that we get from step 2] (To execute the form).
  4. CALL FUNCTION 'FP_JOB_CLOSE' (To close the output)

The final result is an empty PDF (Only the structure but not the data).

Any input will be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance and best regards,

Andres

entry.title: Change Screen Name under Contexts
entry.content:
Hi, currently one of the interface of my app is being revamped. I would like to transfer my guided tour content from the old screen to the new screen. May I know if it is possible to change the screen name under Contexts ?

Can i change it in either Manager or Producer?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Edge Integration Cell : Design, deploy and manage APIs
entry.content:
Hi  Ashutosh,

Thanks for the detail post.  I followed your blog and was able to create the same API and test it; however, if I try to connect to an internal resource (ODATA in ECC), I'm presented with an option of either "Internet" or "Manual" for Proxy Type in the ODATA connector, and when I select "Manual", I have to provide the Proxy Host and Port.  Where would I find the value for the proxy host?

Thanks,

Rich

entry.content:
Hi corrfpa, 

   There is no calculated dimension concept yet in modeler. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting with chargeable components

entry.title: How to cancel a large number of Supplier invoice in bulk？
entry.content:
I know that the supplier invoice list（F1060A ）  can be used to reverse supplier invoice(F0859) . But it can only be cancelled one at one time. What app can I use to cancel a large number of of Supplier invoice in bulk？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to cancel a large number of Supplier invoice in b...
entry.content:
There is no app to mass reverse supplier invoices. As workaround you may consider using APIs as below:

ODATA API Supplier Invoice - OData V2:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/bb9f1469daf04bd894ab2167f8132a1a/de8c37d56eb641dc82b9b8c38be00318.html?locale=en-US

SOAP API Supplier Invoice - Reverse (A2A, Inbound, Asynchronous):
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/bb9f1469daf04bd894ab2167f8132a1a/f909a2658dd643eb9097ffbdf4e4fa13.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: VS Code Configuration - Error on Created Application during Data Source and Service Selection
entry.content:
There is issue with my Visual Studio Code, during the initial creation of Save System, I’m able to do the connection testing (using same username and password)

 

 

But upon login or trying to create the application using wizard we are facing authentication error on steps Data Source and Service Selection. 

its return Authentication incorrect! error message.

We already double check the user name and password , it match exactly with backend and we can login successfully also when trying to Save System config in VS Code 

 

Thank you.

#visualstudiocode
SAP Fiori for SAP ERP

entry.title: Re: Change Screen Name under Contexts
entry.content: Not any more, no. You need to go into the simulation, find the screen(s) that have that context, and then change the screen name there (Screen > Rerecord > Context). Those fields you are looking at will be re-generated automatically on save.

entry.title: Re: STO between a plant that is Automatic Batch Split Val...
entry.content: What happens if the sending plant sends multiple batches with different valuation types? Should I change the PO to different line items with different valuation types?

entry.title: Re: Sales Contracts in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_order quantity restriction compared to contract quan
entry.content:
Hi Thangaraj,

In S/4HANA Cloud, the restriction that order quantity shall be less then referenced contract item is not provided, instead, the warning message is raised.

The customizing mentioned above is not exposed to cloud, therefore there's no hard check based on the customizing.

Thanks a lot and Best Regards,

Andy

entry.title: Custom Code Text Reading Issue in SAP CDS View
entry.content:
Hello Guru!

In Custom Fields and Logic, custom Code and TEXT were added as shown below.
And I posted it with a custom code in the Accounting journal entry app. I also confirmed that the corresponding code was saved in the I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA table (CDS view).


In a custom development report that reads the I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA table (CDS view)
I want to read the text corresponding to the custom code.

It cannot be read because the API State is Cannot be set.

YY1_ACTIVITYCODE_W


Please help me with how to read the text of Custom Code.

thank you

Huny

entry.title: Re: Custom Reporting using Advance Compliance Report in S4HANA Cloud

Hello @Amith_Nair ,

How do you assign reporting category? In my case, if i assign Country in reporting category when create , my reporting category doesn't appear to choose. 

Thank you very much.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：技术话题（Technology Cross Topics）
entry.content:
1. 数据迁移

在SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition的2408版本中，Migration Cockpit新增了以下迁移对象：

  • Asset to control tax credits (Brazil)

  • Bank

  • Configurable BOM links

  • EHS - Business partner for waste transporters and disposers

  • EHS - Control

  • EHS - Job

  • EHS - Waste disposal channel

  • EHS - Waste stream

  • EHS - Waste transporter and disposer

  • EHS - Waste type and waste codes

  • In-house banking account (new)

  • In-house banking condition (new)

  • PC - Ecological information

  • PC - Toxicological information

  • PC - Use

  • QM - Quality level

  • Real estate - Usable object

  • Routing (new)

以下迁移对象被标记为“Deprecated”：

  • Bank (deprecated)

  • Business solution order (deprecated)

  • FI - Bank account balance (deprecated)

  • JVA - Joint venture master data (deprecated)

  • Routing (deprecated)

如想了解关于数据迁移在2408版本中的更多信息，请查看以下链接：

Change Overview for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 | SAP Help Portal

 

2. Belize主题弃用

在2408版本更新中，界面显示外观主题的Belize系列将被弃用。如果您正在使用这些主题，建议您更新到Horizon主题。

 

3. 锁定产品主数据特定字段不可编辑

在产品主数据应用中，新增了一个复选框可以锁定指定字段，被锁定的字段将变得不可编辑。

 

4. 更方便的查看扩展对象的更新

在之前的版本中，我们会在不同的文档链接中发布那些已更改、已删除、已弃用或新的扩展对象，比如CDS视图、API、业务对象接口等等。那样你会需要查看很多文档链接，不够方便。

现在，我们将在一个统一的链接里公布所有的扩展对象的更新，你可以使用不同的过滤器查看你感兴趣的更新。

你可以记住以下地址，该链接会始终打开最新版本的内容：

 https://help.sap.com/S4_CE_CHANGES_EXT_OBJ

 

5. 在IAM Information System里查找业务角色和预定义空间的关系

当我们在给业务角色分配空间，想知道什么预定义空间分配给了哪些角色。那么，我们可以在IAM Information System应用里查找到这些信息。

点击Business Role - Launchpad Space，我们可以快速查找相关信息。

entry.title: The used and unused object list in CCLM
entry.content:
Hi, Now we have config the CCLM in our solman system, and there is correct data in the dashboard. It shows that the number of used objects is about 9,000, the number of unused objects is about 36,000, the number of N/A is about 65,000. Now I get that the object list is stored in the table AGSCCL_OBJECT. But I can't find any attributes in this table that can distinguish usage situations.

So that is my question:

In which table is the usage details stored in the dashboard? Or what filtering criteria can I use to obtain a detailed list of custom objects used and unused in the corresponding dashboard. Thanks.

#CCM

SOLMAN Business Process Operations @Sap

Hi @Chaitanya_Priya ,

entry.title: Re: What's the major difference between odata and S/4hana...
entry.content:
Hi,

The answer is powered by Joule. The major difference between OData and S/4HANA Connection in SAP Analytics Cloud is that OData is used to import transaction data from SAP S/4HANA or S/4HANA Cloud to SAP Analytics Cloud, while S/4HANA Connection is used to establish a connection between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP S/4HANA Cloud for planning and budgeting processes. OData services are available for importing various types of data, such as journal entries, financial planning data, balance flows, cost estimates, and statistical key figures. On the other hand, S/4HANA Connection enables the integration of SAP Analytics Cloud with SAP S/4HANA Cloud for activities like budget planning and group reporting.

In most cases, S/4HANA connections are recommended for accessing custom CDS views due to their expected performance advantages.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: I am unable to print PO form.
entry.content:
We are using ME23N t-code to print PO form but unable to print po form it is asking for password when we try to click on print option. we can be able to save the po form but when we open saved pdf it is asking for password. We tried in ME9F also we got same issue. I can see the printing is not allowed in file permissions. How to provide access to print PO form.

Is there any option to enable printing permission from Basis or ABAP side?

entry.title: Re: How to implement RAP action in Un Managed Custom Entity
entry.content:
Hi Kumar, hope you are doing fine.

I'm facing the same issue when trying to build a RAP service. Were you able to fix it or find a workaround for it?

entry.title: Re: GPS Validation in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Hi Mehak, Check the part 2 of this dev challenge where we were doing something similar to your requirement https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-discussions/april-citizen-developer-challenge-sap-build-apps-task-4-mobile-device/td-p/13680103 . Import this project https://github.com/sap-tutorials/sap-build-apps/blob/main/projects/challenges-2024/NearbyApp-Final.mtar and refer the logic attached to the "Check distance" button on the Details page. You can modify this logic slightly ie use the logic in the arePointsNearBy as thats your requirement, so that you can alert a message if the admin is inside/outside of the 10km radius.

entry.title: Can the system make a beep/bell sound when there is an error using SAP screen personas script?
entry.content: If we have an error shown in a screen, can we allow the system to make a beep/bell sound using SAP Screen personas scripts/flavour? Any help on this is mich appreciated.

Hi Everyone,

I have hidden some of the fields in the Form, but there is lot of blank spaces as you can see it in the screenshot. I dont need those fields or section. Now the form looks really ugly. Is there any way to hide the section or decrease the blank space. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP RAP : Custom Entities with compositions relationship in a Fiori Elements App
entry.content:
Hi Ramjee! 

Thanks for your post, it was really helpful for a service I'm building right now. I have a couple of questions/issues which I've been trying to fix for a while but could not find a workaround and maybe you can help me with!

1) We have a scenario where we need to access the result of the first custom entity read in the second one. For example: when reading the items, we need to access the header obtained in the first step. But the problem is that each entity is being executed in its own session so we can't even use export to memory or global variables to store data. Is there a way to achieve it and make it work like a GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET?

2) We have the custom entities created and we associated an action to it to create a sales order using the standard API. The problem is that we need to call the action sending like a payload with all the information of the sales order to be created. Is it possible? Or we may need to go with a custom unmanaged BO ?

Thanks and regards!

entry.title: Re: What has replaced sybase.subscribenet.com for PowerBu...
entry.content: Thanks to the member who posted the link to https://go.support.sap.com/minisap/#/minisap. I visited the page but not finding PowerBuilder among the listed programs, I thought it didn't apply. Later I revisited the page and found the link at the top of that page, "Go to Sybase Product Download Center (SPDC) License Rehost". That opens a simple form where you import your PB125.lic file (which you need to get from the current host), enter the new Host ID and new host name. Click the Generate button and you're prompted for the save file name and location. Copy the new PB125.lic file to the new host, open PB 12.5, use Tools>Update License to bring in the new license. Restart PB and check that the license info under Help>About is now correct. Problem solved.

entry.title: Re: How to communicate the value of Enterprise Architecture in SAP projects
entry.content:
Agree with consideration and value an EA provides.  

I particularly agree with consideration #2.

The challenges are that customer are engaging an SI to assist them on the feasibility and business case for their S/4HANA implementation, bypassing their internal EA department, which is bad governance.

I have yet seen an SI partner, who provides an EA on these engagements, as they focus on SAP solution only.

Also challenging, each SI partner demonstrates their own ecosystem of frameworks and accelerators, adding more chaos!

entry.title: RAP Framework - Custom Entities GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We have an scenario where we need to migrate a SEGW service to RAP. This service retrieves values from custom tables but has several entities and a lot of custom logic behind, so we opted for custom entities.

The problem is that in the current SEGW we are using the GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET functionality and we are not being able to replicate that with Custom Entities.

When reading the different entities data we need to be able to access the previous ones. For example: we read the Header custom entity but then the system process the read of the Positions custom entity in a different session so we can't access the Header data even if we try to do it with memory or global variables.

The return of the service works fine, the EXPAND is working and we end up getting the Header and the Position entities together, but the problem is that when reading the Positions we need to do some custom logic that involves using the Header data we can't access.

Is it possible to achieve this? Or is there a workaround to handle GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET while using custom entities?

Thanks and regards!

entry.title: Re: How to Master Planning strategies in SAP PP Demand Ma...
entry.content:
Hi,

For start you can refer the below help portal documentation on demand management, which includes planning strategies with sample scenarios.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/eedc1019283a438a8b73fdde490abc4f/0f23bf53d25ab64ce10000000a174cb4.html?q=production%20strategies

For additional content you can search the community too.

you should apply what you have learn in a test system, by testing various strategies and their outcome to get a clear understanding.

Regards,

Arjuna

entry.title: Re: What's the major difference between odata and S/4hana...
entry.content:
first option, sac connected to odata, not your cds.

second option should be better, odata conversion takes additional time(compare with direct connection),  odata is the additional layer between sac and cds.

entry.title: Re: How to Reclaim size of volume "/hana/shared and /hana...
entry.content:
After i delete log file in /hana/shared and /hana/log. hdbindexserver can not running .

How can I solve it ?

entry.title: RAP(RestfulABAP) custom entity Projection view Problems
entry.content:
Hello

I am currently publishing an OData API that queries data through RAP Managed Query.

It was working well, but customer requirements added a business scenario in which data was added to a specific CBO table when certain privileged users READ data.

After reviewing the lifecycles of the RAP to use the feature, we conclude that MANAGED QUERY does not have any special events to deal with it.

So I'm trying to change the existing query to UNMANAGED Query to implement this, but there was a problem.

Currently, our BO is not directly bound to the service, but binding through the projection view.

Problem is I'm trying to replace Root Entities with Custom Entities, so Custom Entities do not allow projection views!!

Because projection views are not allowed, deleting entire projection structures and changing them to use custom entities directly will require a huge number of code changes and likely have negative side effects.

So.. is there another way to projection this custom entity through "AS Projection On [custom entity]" < grammar?

Or, is there a separate callback that allows me to perform my custom logic after a read event occurs to use managed queries as they are?

Best regards

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model 
@

entry.title: Re: How to Reclaim size of volume "/hana/shared and /hana...
Re: RAP Framework - Custom Entities GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET
entry.content: we also had same issue,in the io_request, actually you have all the header data, but sap just didn't give you api to get it, you have to query it again(your custom logic) to get header data.

entry.title: Which Communication Scenario can get Currency Exchange Rate data configured in SAP?
entry.content:
Hi，

I am configuring Odata API in SAP app: Communication Arrangements. I wan to get a table about Currency Exchange Rate , Which scenario include this data? Or is there a query facility for scenario?

Thanks~

entry.title: Re: ML currencies are not integrated in FI for valuation area m123. Message No. FML_CUST033
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

 

maintian controlling area

create controlling area and assign a controlling area to a company code in SAP: Path: SPRO > IMG > Controlling > General Controlling > Organization

Select New Entries or Copy CO Area Fill in the mandatory fields, including Controlling Area and CoCd>CO Area Choose from the following options for CoCd>CO Area: Controlling Area same as Company Code: Assigns only one company code to a controlling area

I have maintained currency type: 10 Assign company codes to the controlling area 

In material legder activation process

Goto T code: OMX2 and create new material legder type EX: V123 and assign the currencyvaluation type: 10 (Company code currency) and save

Goto Tcode: OMX3------Goto new entries My valuation area: VIYY, company code: VIYA, Material ldger type: 9000, now the status is in Green and ML currencies are allowed in FI and save now the issue is resolved.

we have to do T codes: OMX1 and CKMSTART for to activate material ledger as peoductive for the required valuation area

 

In my case issue is resolved, please ping back here if it helps to anyone to resolve the similar issue

entry.title: Re: How to Reclaim size of volume "/hana/shared and /hana...
entry.content:
Deleting log files may cause system issues due to their role in tracking and debugging.

Here's a solution:
1. Restart the HANA system using `HDB stop` and `HDB start`.
2. Restore the log files if you have a backup.
3. Ensure sufficient disk space in /hana/shared and /hana/log directories to allow hdbindexserver to run.
4. Verify correct permissions for the same directories.
5. Use `HDB admin_check` to check system logs for more information on hdbindexserver issues.

]

entry.title: Re: Accessing long text of SAP Master data Objects or fields in S4 Hana through a CDS View
entry.content:
@koyaajai @fischerm, I found a way for program ESH_SR_LTXT_REPLICATE to use other Text Objects. Do note however that this is not recommended by SAP and is explicitly stated in OSS note 3048704. So, only do it with that in mind.

The text objects that it can process are defined in view ESH_V_LT_CDSASOC. These entries are CDS-entities that have an association to I_TextObjectPlainLongText. To be able to process texts that are not defined by SAP there, do the following:

  1. Create a custom CDS-entity in ADT that does an association to I_TextObjectPlainLongText. You can check the association done by I_Product as reference.
  2. After creating and activating the CDS-entity, add a new entry to ESH_V_LT_CDSASOC for the CDS-entity that you created. This will ask you for a customizing Transport Request.
  3. Run program ESH_SR_LTXT_REPLICATE in Test mode using your other/custom text object to confirm that it was able to pick-up the data and process.
  4. Once the test run looks okay, proceed using the Update Run option.

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot status CRTD CHCR SPRQ
entry.content: Hi, Please check the inspection setup for inspection type 03/04 etc. If the "Manual sample calc." option is selected in the material master, then you need to perform the manual sample calculation in the inspection lot. Thank you.

entry.title: Flexible Workflow PO - How to Skip/Auto Approve
entry.content:
Hello,

In the flexible workflow for Purchase order, how can we skip/auto approve if the approver repeats more then once in workflow ?

Assume in the WF, we have 6 level approvers, in which at level 2 (Dept. Head) & level 4 (CFO) its same user,  when the User at level 2 approves, system should either Auto Approve/Skip the level 4 in the WF process.

Similary it should work in the Substituion scenario also.

entry.title: Re: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Opt...
entry.content:
Hello, Yes we had the same situation.

To obtain same or better performance, we had to analyse the performance of all scripts (performance analyzer).

We didn't use the view port loading, we only use the background loading process.

Are you using scripts too or simple stories ?

This scenario is common for us .the system was working fine for year 22-23 . But this time it is behaving like this .

Is there any way to generate annexure for month OCT 23- Mar 24 also .

Thanks in Advance ,

Shikha Singh Chauhan

entry.title: IObit Driver Booster Pro Crack 11.6.0.128 Free Download
entry.content:
IObit Driver Booster PRO 11.5.0.85 + Portable (2024 Latest)

Free Download IObit Driver Booster Pro 11.6.0.128 - Full version Offline Installer - Nvidia, AMD, Intel & Dell driver update software.

Free Download IObit Driver Booster Pro full version standalone offline installer for Windows PC to Easily Detect & Update Over 2,500,000 Outdated, Faulty, Missing & Game Ready Drivers.

Download Cracked File Here

Overview of IObit Driver Booster Pro 

Updating drivers is usually an initial step to avoid hardware failure, system instability, and hidden security vulnerabilities. Update drivers regularly is also an effective way to enhance your overall PC performance and maximize your gaming experience.

Based on the cloud library, IObit Driver Booster Pro can always be the first to identify outdated drivers and download and update drivers at an unrivaled speed. The backup feature is an easy, effective, and risk-free solution to keep your drivers up-to-date.

For the high performance of your Windows system, software and hardware need to work accordingly with each other. So it is necessary to update device drivers regularly and always function properly. Driver Booster 6 checks and updates over 2,500,000+ device drivers from Intel, Nvidia, AMD, etc., to help you reduce system freezing and crashing.

Features of IObit Driver Booster Pro

  • Download and Update Outdated Drivers with One Click
  • Enhance Hardware Functionality for Top Performance
  • Specialized Driver Tweaking for Top Gaming Experience
  • Automatically Identify Outdated Drivers
  • Support More Comprehensive Hardware Devices
  • Enjoy Priority to Update Outdated Drivers Promptly
  • Backup Drivers for Safe Restore
  • Download and Update Drivers up to 300% Faster
  • Automatically Update to the Latest Version
  • Optimized scan logic in Boost module for less resource consumption.

    System Requirements and Technical Details

    • Supported OS: Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8.1, Windows 7
    • RAM (Memory): 2 GB RAM (4 GB recommended)
    • Free Hard Disk Space: 200 MB or more

entry.title: sap mobile start - how to create a tile to launch custom app developed using mdk in sap bas?
entry.content:
I have followed few developer tutorials:

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-enhance.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-level-up.html

this below blog has shown creating tile selecting "no system"

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-mobile-start-adding-native-apps-to-your-content/ba-p/13515218

entry.content:
IObit Software Updater Pro 7.0.0.16 Crack provides an easy way to schedule and execute software updates even when the computer is turned off. It works by automatically downloading and installing the latest update drivers. The iOBit software updater provides prompt software updates by recommending only the most popular and secure program currently installed in the computer. A unique feature iOBit software updater pro gives is its ability to search through any OS X installation disk to find and replace outdated. This ensures that your computer’s performance will remain stable and error free while using your favorite applications.

Download Cracked File Here

IObit Software Updater Pro 7.0.0.16 Features Key:

  • The IOBit Software Updater is a very useful tool which will keep your system updated automatically.
  • It scans the system inbuiltly after installation and supplies with a complete list of computer drivers with all details and when they require an update, so that IOBit Driver Booster can find the CORRECT driver online.
  • With iobit software updater crack the computer will be fixed automatically.
  • The software updater will help you to make sure that your computer is always updated.
  • This you will have instant access to the latest version of your operating system.
  • The iobit updater can help you fix up several issues like outdated drivers, broken networking devices.
  • This product also provides an automated  facility so that it is easy to restore the previous working version if any problem occurs during the updation.
  • The tool will allow you to create an offline folder and save all the relevant details for downloading the latest security updates and other related stuffs.
  • The iOBit software updater provides prompt software updates by recommending only the most popular and secure program currently installed in the computer.
  • A unique feature iOBit software updater pro gives is its ability to search through any OS X installation disk to find and replace outdated or corrupt drivers.

entry.title: Re: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Opt...
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing your experience with converting SAC stories to the optimized design. It's interesting to hear about the performance changes you've observed. There could be various reasons for the increased load times, such as differences in how data is handled or changes in visualization complexity. I'm curious to know if others have encountered similar issues and what solutions might be available.

Kind regards,

Sydney Digital Agency

entry.title: [BYD] how to find out who registered the contract and project
entry.content:
Please tell me how to find out who registered the contract and project.
Not the person responsible, but the person who registered.

Since it is possible to know the registrants of orders and purchase orders, I think it is possible to check the above two items (contracts and projects), but I could not find them by myself.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [BYD] how to find out who registered the contract and...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

According to 2665406 - How to Find the Creator of the Copy From a Contract, the identity of the person who creates a document is not stored.

Different from purchasing contract, the "created by" field isn't exposed on the UI (isn't part of the standard) as it's a technical field and not necessarily related to business data.

If client would like to know creator of a specific contract, the creation identity of the person who created a document can be found in the backend on the ROOT node of the CUSTOMER_CONTRACT BO.

 

Regards,
Carrie

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: SM20 audit log - RFC/CPIC logon failed errors
entry.content: @sravankumar319: Did you find any solution to this problem?

entry.title: BTP IRPA screens don't identify for other users
entry.content: When I share a project with other users, the screen doesn't identify.  It runs fine on my machine, and doesn't appear to have anything user specific in the title text that was used for the recognition criteria.

entry.title: Re: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Optimized Design Experience
entry.content: Could you please raise this to SAP via incident? Thanks.

entry.title: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content: Greetings, we are interested to learn what functionality now replaces scope item 19C which is no longer available in 2402. Can SAP please recommend the Best Practice alternative approach we should adopt to achieve similar functionality?

entry.title: Re: Delete duplicate customers in SAP CDC
entry.content:
Hi @samuelyang, I am preparing for CDC Certification and would need more of these recorded sessions, Could you please share if you have them

 

Thanks,

Ameen

entry.title: Re: Change Screen Name under Contexts
entry.content:
Hi Natalie,

If you are talking about relinking individual steps in a Guided Tour to new screen, you can do this in the Element tab of the step that must be updated.  To do this:

1. Open the Guided Tour for editing
2. Open the new application screen
3. Open the individual Guided Tour step for editing and navigate to the Element screen
4. Click the Change Screen ID button

 That will modify the context on that individual step.  You will need to update the context on the other steps that also relate to the new screen.

Regards
Shane
